steps.title: Recognize that all probabilities sum to 1
steps.content:
The three sections account for all attendees. Therefore:
$$P(A) + P(B) + P(C) = 1$$

steps.title: Calculate the probability for section C
Convert probability to number of attendees
steps.content:
Multiply the probability by the total number of attendees:
$$0.35 \times 400 = 140$$
That matches Choice D — $140$.
